parameters.content:
## Welcome! Start Here

This workflow checks for new Jumia orders and instantly notifies you via Telegram and WhatsApp.

Before activating the workflow:

• Add your Jumia API credentials
• Configure Telegram credentials
• Configure WhatsApp Cloud API credentials
• Create the Data Table
• Test using Manual Trigger
• Enable the Schedule Trigger when everything works


Authenticate
        ↓
Fetch Orders
        ↓
Normalize Data
        ↓
Skip Existing Orders
        ↓
Format Message
        ↓
Telegram
        ↓
WhatsApp
        ↓
Save Processed Order

## Polling

The Schedule Trigger is disabled by default.

After configuration:

✓ Enable the trigger
✓ Adjust the polling interval if needed

Default interval:
Every 5 minutes

## Configure Jumia API

Replace the following values:

• REPLACE_WITH_JUMIA_CLIENT_ID
• REPLACE_WITH_JUMIA_REFRESH_TOKEN
• REPLACE_WITH_SELLER_ID

These are used to authenticate against the Jumia Vendor API.

## Duplicate Protection

Create an n8n Data Table named:

jumia_processed_orders

Required columns:

seller_id
marketplace
order_id
status
first_seen
notified_at
raw_payload

This prevents duplicate notifications.

## Notification Setup

Telegram

• Connect Telegram credentials
• Replace REPLACE_WITH_TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID

WhatsApp

• Connect Meta Cloud API credentials
• Replace:
  - Phone Number ID
  - Seller WhatsApp Number

name: Notify new Jumia orders via Telegram and WhatsApp Cloud API
